name: Tomato Rarebit.
recipeIngredient: 1 oz (30 g) mature cheddar cheese, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the grated cheese, Worcestershire sauce, and cayenne pepper.
2. Toast the bread lightly. Arrange the sliced tomato on top of the toast. Spoon the cheese mixture over the surface.
3. Place under the grill until the cheese is bubbling and golden brown. Garnish with a sprig of parsley and serve immediately.
Preparation time: 2 minutes
Cooking time: 5 minutes
